summary: Successfully verified .env.local file setup for DynoPay Next.js application. All environment variables configured correctly with proper pod URLs. Frontend accessible and displaying DynoPay content properly. Backend API endpoints responding correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Element appears outside viewport during automated testing - may be CSS/layout related

passed_tests: ✅ .env.local file exists with all 8 required environment variables
✅ NEXTAUTH_URL correctly set to pod URL
✅ NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL correctly set to pod URL
✅ Frontend accessible at pod URL with DynoPay branding
✅ Homepage loads with substantial content (2781+ characters)
✅ Navigation menu items present (How It Works, Features, Use Cases, Documentation)
✅ Main action buttons clickable (Get Started, Start Accepting Crypto, Learn More)
✅ Backend health endpoints responding (18/18 API tests passed)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (18/18 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor Sign In button viewport issue)
